sourceText: 코르시카 섬의 아작시오에서 8명의 자녀 중 둘째 아들로 태어남.
translatedText: Born as the second son of eight children in Ajaccio on the island of Corsica.

sourceText: 형 조제프와 함께 프랑스로 건너가 오탱 수도원 부속 종교학교에 입학함.
translatedText: Moved to France with his older brother Joseph and entered the religious school attached to the Autun Abbey.
Entered the military academy at Brienne.
Entered the École Militaire in Paris.
His father Carlo died of stomach cancer.

sourceText: 포병장교 임용시험에 합격하여 16세의 나이에 소위로 임관함.
translatedText: Passed the artillery officer examination and was commissioned as a second lieutenant at the age of 16.

sourceText: 발랑스에 주둔하고 있던 라페르 연대에 포병장교로 부임함.
translatedText: Assigned as an artillery officer to the La Fère regiment stationed in Valence.

sourceText: 라페르 연대가 오손으로 주둔지를 옮기자 그곳에서 근무함.
translatedText: Served in Auxonne when the La Fère regiment relocated its garrison there.
Took a leave of absence and returned to his hometown in Corsica.

sourceText: 파올리 측에 의해 구금되고 집과 농장을 약탈당한 후 가족들과 함께 코르시카를 탈출함.
translatedText: Detained by Paoli's faction, his house and farm were looted, and he fled Corsica with his family.

sourceText: 툴롱 포위전에서 레기에트와 발라기에 요새를 탈환하여 승리하고 준장으로 진급함.
translatedText: Recaptured the L'Eguillette and Balaguier forts during the Siege of Toulon, achieving victory and being promoted to brigadier general.

sourceText: 테르미도르의 반동 사건이 발생하여 로베스피에르 일당이 처형됨.
translatedText: The Thermidorian Reaction occurred, resulting in the execution of Robespierre and his followers.

sourceText: 로베스피에르의 동생 오귀스탱과의 친분으로 투옥되었다가 곧 석방됨.
translatedText: Imprisoned due to his friendship with Robespierre's younger brother Augustin, but released shortly after.
Suppressed the royalist uprising in Paris.
Appointed commander of the Army of Italy.

sourceText: 오스트리아의 수도 빈을 점령하고 캄포포르지오 조약을 체결함.
translatedText: Captured the Austrian capital Vienna and signed the Treaty of Campo Formio.

sourceText: 5만여 명의 병력을 이끌고 이집트의 알렉산드리아 항에 상륙하며 이집트 원정을 시작함.
translatedText: Led over 50,000 troops to land at the port of Alexandria, Egypt, beginning the Egyptian campaign.

sourceText: 프랑스 해군이 아부키르 만에서 호라시오 넬슨의 영국 함대에 패배함.
translatedText: The French navy was defeated by Horatio Nelson's British fleet at the Battle of Aboukir Bay.
Escaped from Egypt and returned to France.

sourceText: 혁명정부의 권력자 시에예스와 함께 브뤼메르 쿠데타를 일으킴.
translatedText: Staged the Coup of 18 Brumaire with Emmanuel Joseph Sieyès, a powerful figure in the revolutionary government.

sourceText: 3명의 통령을 두는 새 헌법이 국민 투표에 부쳐져 통과됨.
translatedText: A new constitution establishing three consuls was put to a national referendum and passed.
The French expeditionary force crossed the Great St Bernard Pass.

sourceText: 오스트리아 군대와 맞붙은 마렝고 전투에서 승리를 거둠.
translatedText: Achieved victory at the Battle of Marengo against the Austrian army.

sourceText: 프랑스 은행을 설립하여 경제 안정을 도모함.
translatedText: Established the Bank of France to promote economic stability.

sourceText: 미국과 몰트퐁텐 조약을 통해 관계를 원만하게 마무리 지음.
translatedText: Amicably settled relations with the United States through the Treaty of Mortefontaine.

sourceText: 교황 비오 7세와 정치 및 정교협약을 맺음.
translatedText: Signed a political and religious concordat with Pope Pius VII.

sourceText: 3만여 명의 원정대를 아이티(산도밍고)에 파견하여 식민지 재탈환과 노예제 부활을 시도함.
translatedText: Dispatched an expeditionary force of over 30,000 to Haiti (Saint-Domingue) to recapture the colony and attempt to restore slavery.

sourceText: 영국과 아미앵 조약을 체결하여 10년 만에 안정을 맞음.
translatedText: Signed the Treaty of Amiens with Britain, bringing peace for the first time in 10 years.
Became First Consul for life, consolidating his dictatorial power.
Sold Louisiana to the United States for $15 million.

sourceText: 나폴레옹을 반대하며 부르봉 왕정복고를 희망하던 조르주 카두달과 왕당파들의 암살 음모가 발각됨.
translatedText: An assassination plot against Napoleon by Georges Cadoudal and royalists hoping for a Bourbon restoration was uncovered.
Abandoned the occupation of Haiti and withdrew troops.

sourceText: 아이티가 정식으로 독립하여 최초의 흑인 공화국이 됨.
translatedText: Haiti formally gained independence, becoming the first black republic.

sourceText: 국민 투표를 통해 제정 수락이 결정됨.
translatedText: The acceptance of the empire was decided through a national plebiscite.

sourceText: 노트르담 대성당에서 즉위식을 거행하여 프랑스 제국의 초대 황제 나폴레옹 1세가 됨.
translatedText: Held his coronation at Notre-Dame Cathedral, becoming Napoleon I, the first Emperor of the French Empire.

sourceText: 트라팔가르 해전에서 넬슨이 이끈 영국 해군에게 프랑스 해군이 참패함.
translatedText: The French navy suffered a crushing defeat against the British navy led by Nelson at the Battle of Trafalgar.

sourceText: 아우스터리츠 전투에서 프랑스군이 완승을 거두고 오스트리아는 프레스부르트 조약을 체결하여 항복함.
translatedText: The French army achieved a decisive victory at the Battle of Austerlitz, and Austria surrendered by signing the Treaty of Pressburg.
Installed his younger brother Louis as the King of Holland.

sourceText: 예나-아우어슈테트 전투에서 프로이센군을 물리치고 베를린에 입성함.
translatedText: Defeated the Prussian army at the Battle of Jena-Auerstedt and entered Berlin.
Issued the Berlin Decree, establishing the Continental System.
Signed the Treaties of Tilsit with Alexander I of Russia.
Invaded Portugal after it violated the Continental System.

sourceText: 마드리드 주민들이 프랑스 군대에 대항하여 폭동을 일으킴.
translatedText: The residents of Madrid rebelled against the French army.

sourceText: 교황이 파문을 선포하자 체포하여 사보나에 유폐시킴.
translatedText: When the Pope declared excommunication, he was arrested and imprisoned in Savona.

sourceText: 오스트리아 황제 프란츠 1세의 딸 마리 루이즈와 재혼함.
translatedText: Remarried Marie Louise, daughter of Emperor Francis I of Austria.

sourceText: 스웨덴이 프랑스 육군 원수 베르나도트에게 스웨덴 차기 왕위계승을 제의함.
translatedText: Sweden offered the position of heir presumptive to the Swedish throne to French Marshal Bernadotte.
Marie Louise gave birth to Napoleon II, the King of Rome.
Launched the invasion of Russia with a Grand Army of 600,000 men.
Forcibly transferred the Pope to Fontainebleau.

sourceText: 보로디노 근처에서 벌어진 대전투에서 프랑스 군이 승리함.
translatedText: The French army won the major Battle of Borodino.
The French army retreated from Russia.
Signed the Concordat of Fontainebleau with Pope Pius VII.

sourceText: 라이프치히 전투에서 동맹군에게 포위공격 당하여 대패함.
translatedText: Suffered a crushing defeat under siege by the coalition forces at the Battle of Leipzig.

sourceText: 퐁텐블로 조약을 체결한 뒤 엘바섬의 영주로 추방됨.
translatedText: Signed the Treaty of Fontainebleau and was exiled as the sovereign of the island of Elba.
Escaped from the island of Elba.
Entered Paris and was restored as Emperor of the French.

sourceText: 워털루 전투에서 영국과 프로이센의 연합 공격으로 패배하며 백일천하가 끝남.
translatedText: Defeated by the combined attack of British and Prussian forces at the Battle of Waterloo, ending the Hundred Days.
Exiled to Saint Helena in the South Atlantic.

sourceText: 유해가 프랑스에 반환되어 파리의 앵발리드에 안치됨.
translatedText: His remains were returned to France and entombed in Les Invalides in Paris.

sourceText: 1804년에 《프랑스 민법전》, 이른바 나폴레옹 법전을 제정하여 전 세계의 민법에 많은 영향을 미쳤다.
translatedText: Enacted the 'French Civil Code', known as the Napoleonic Code, in 1804, which greatly influenced civil law worldwide.
Advancement of Military Tactics and Systems

sourceText: 군사적으로 현대전에까지 영향을 끼쳤고 전술, 전략, 훈련, 조직, 군수, 의복과 포상 제도를 발전시켰다.
translatedText: Militarily influenced modern warfare and developed tactics, strategy, training, organization, logistics, uniforms, and reward systems.
Victory at the Siege of Toulon

sourceText: 1793년 툴롱 포위전에서 승리를 이끈 후 24살에 준장으로 진급하여 장군이 되었다.
translatedText: After leading the victory at the Siege of Toulon in 1793, he was promoted to brigadier general at the age of 24.

sourceText: 1796년 이탈리아 원정에서 대성공을 거두는 등 제1차 대프랑스 동맹 전쟁에서 연승하며 군인으로서 승승장구하였다.
translatedText: Achieved great success in the Italian campaign of 1796, winning consecutive victories in the War of the First Coalition and enjoying a triumphant military career.
Establishment of the Bank of France

sourceText: 1800년에 프랑스 은행을 설립하여 경제 안정을 도모했다.
translatedText: Established the Bank of France in 1800 to promote economic stability.
Creation of the Legion of Honour
Created the famous Legion of Honour in 1802.
